Natanz + Bushehr + Dimona/Arad struck (prior). 88 hospitalized from Dimona-area strikes. IAEA: no radiation. No new nuclear threshold events. iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 23 Hour 02 UTC. IMMINENT (stable). Trump ultimatum ~21.5hrs to deadline (23:44 GMT Mon). Overnight quiet (nighttime ME). ASX -1.9% ($56B wiped). Brent $114.09. Iran defiant - vows 'complete' Hormuz closure + destroy ALL regional energy/IT/desalination if power plants hit. Fuel rationing warnings spreading (Australia, NZ). Global protests (Tel Aviv, London, Berlin). No new military developments overnight. Updated 2026-03-23T02:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 4 ballistic missiles and 25 UAVs launched from Iran TODAY
latest_news.source: Gulf News / UAE Ministry of Defence
latest_news.text: UAE air defence intercepted 4 ballistic missiles + 25 drones from Iran today. Cumulative since war start: 345 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, 1,773 UAVs intercepted. 2 UAE military + 6 foreign nationals killed, 160 injured.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia intercepts ~60 Iranian drones, 3 ballistic missiles toward Riyadh
latest_news.text: Saudi Arabia intercepted nearly 60 Iranian drones targeting Eastern Province energy facilities. 3 ballistic missiles launched toward Riyadh - 1 intercepted, 2 fell in uninhabited areas. Saudi also expelled Iranian military attache + staff.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,500, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Iran Ministry of Health
latest_news.text: Iran state broadcaster confirms 1,500+ killed, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli attacks. 7 hospitals evacuated, 36 ambulances damaged.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes hit eastern Tehran - geographic expansion of attacks
latest_news.text: Israel launched new attacks on Tehran on Sunday, explosions reported in the east of the city - further geographic expansion of strikes beyond oil depot/refinery strikes.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 61% (stable). Day 23 Hour 02 UTC. IMMINENT (stable). IDF Chief: fight 'only just begun.' Katz orders intensified bridge/home demolitions in south Lebanon. 7 IDF soldiers wounded by mortar in north Israel. Cluster bomb fragment in central Israel. 1,029+ killed in Lebanon. 450k mobilized. No ceasefire prospects. Updated 2026-03-23T02:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel orders military to intensify demolitions of bridges + homes in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Defense Minister Katz orders IDF to step up destruction of bridges and demolish homes in frontline villages in southern Lebanon. Aoun calls it 'prelude to ground invasion.' Katz: operations will continue until threats to Israeli communities eliminated.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 23 Hour 01 UTC. DETERRENT (stable). 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began. No new Turkey-specific escalation. Updated 2026-03-23T01:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 33% (up). Day 23 Hour 02 UTC. CRITICAL (stable). ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults, spring-summer offensive prep. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Oil shock boosts Russian revenue. Deadliest day 2026 recorded (1,610 KIA). Updated 2026-03-23T02:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 27% (up). Day 23 Hour 02 UTC. ELEVATED (stable). Eid ceasefire through Mar 24 midnight but badly fraying. Pakistani military violates ceasefire again. TTP kills 3 police in KP. Mortar fire Kunar/Paktika. Post-Eid violence near-certain. Updated 2026-03-23T02:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika, 1 killed
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of firing mortars in Kunar and Paktika during Eid ceasefire - 1 civilian killed. Taliban chief of staff calls it 'deception.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire technically holds through Mar 24 midnight but fraying badly. Multiple breach reports.

top_signals: TRUMP 48HR ULTIMATUM: ~23.5hrs to deadline (23:44 GMT Mon) — 'obliterate power plants starting with biggest'
IRGC DEFIANT: Hormuz 'completely closed' if power plants struck — ALL regional energy + water infrastructure threatened
ARAD STRUCK: 88 hospitalized from Iranian missiles near Dimona — Israel cancels schools Sun/Mon
CLUSTER MUNITIONS: Iranian cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv/Petah Tikva — 15 injured, 7 impact sites across central Israel
GHALIBAF FINANCIAL THREAT: 'Entities buying US Treasury bonds are legitimate targets — we monitor your portfolios'
IDF CHIEF: Fight with Hezbollah 'only just begun' — war 'several more weeks'
LEBANON: Katz orders intensified bridge/home demolitions — Qasmiyeh Bridge destroyed — Aoun: 'prelude to ground invasion'
OIL: Brent at $114.09 — 440M barrels lost in 22 days — ASX set for 1.8% wipeout
BESSENT: 'Sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate' — Kharg Island occupation possible
PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: Ceasefire through Mar 24 but FT says 'breaking point' — post-Eid violence near-certain
UAE: Intercepts 4 ballistic missiles + 25 drones TODAY — vessel incident off Sharjah coast
2,000+ DEAD across region — war enters FOURTH week

new: Pakistan ceasefire breached: mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika during Eid, 1 civilian killed
Bessent: US may occupy Kharg Island — 'could become American asset'
2,500 additional marines + 3 amphibious assault ships deploying
IRGC explicitly threatens Hormuz 'completely closed' if power plants struck
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 18 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan Eid ceasefire technically through Mar 24 but breached (mortar fire Kunar/Paktika). IAEA confirms no radiation at Dimona/Natanz. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~28hrs. IRGC threatens 'complete' Hormuz closure + retaliation on ALL regional infrastructure. Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate' + Kharg Island occupation possible. 2,500 more marines deploying. 2,000+ dead. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline. Pakistan ceasefire fraying — post-Eid violence feared.

latest_news.headline: ASX plunges 1.9% to 10-month low - AU$56bn wiped out
latest_news.text: Australian share market hits 10-month low, down 1.9% wiping AU$56bn. Index down 10% since conflict began. Fuel rationing warnings in Australia/NZ. Brent at $114.09.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens to destroy ALL regional energy, water, IT infrastructure if power plants hit
latest_news.text: Iran responds to Trump ultimatum: any strike on power plants triggers attacks on US-Israel energy, desalination, and IT infrastructure across region. 'Legitimate targets' declaration.

latest_news.headline: Global anti-war protests: Tel Aviv, London, Berlin
latest_news.text: Major anti-war demonstrations worldwide. Tel Aviv protesters paint hands red, demand arms embargo. London: 'stop Trump's wars.' Berlin: memorial for Minab school strike victims.

latest_news.headline: Pope Leo condemns war as 'scandal to entire human family'
latest_news.text: Pope Leo denounces Middle East war in weekly prayer at St Peter's Square. Calls for hostilities to cease and paths of peace. Deep concern for civilian suffering.

latest_news.headline: Australia fuel rationing warning - ex-ACCC chair says 'nightmarish decisions ahead'
latest_news.text: Former ACCF chair Allan Fels warns fuel rationing 'looming as real possibility.' Suggests odd/even plate restrictions, speed limits, work-from-home. 6 fuel ships to Australia cancelled.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 23, 02:04 UTC). TRUMP ULTIMATUM ~21.5hrs to deadline (23:44 GMT Mon). Quiet overnight in ME (nighttime). Iran defiant on Hormuz closure + infrastructure retaliation. ASX -1.9%, Brent $114.09. Fuel crisis spreading globally. IDF says Lebanon fight 'only just begun.' Pakistan ceasefire fraying badly. Global protests growing. Zero de-escalation signals. Countdown to ultimatum deadline tonight.
de_escalation_watch: Day 23 Hour 02 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: None. Quiet overnight (nighttime ME) but no diplomatic activity. Pakistan Eid ceasefire through Mar 24 but fraying. IAEA: no radiation. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~21.5hrs. Iran threatens ALL regional energy + water + IT infrastructure. ASX crash, fuel crisis spreading. IDF intensifies Lebanon operations. 2,000+ dead. NET: ZERO de-escalation. Countdown to ultimatum deadline tonight.
